subject: Update inventory and sch charts
commit_message:
Update inventory and sch charts

* Switch inventory to serve over https
* Have SCH use https when making calls to inventory

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-913
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1597
Signed-off-by: Michael Hwang <mhwang@research.att.com>
Change-Id: Id2dc3b2d6f58d1cbfa56f7eeb32e9b3ddba8b16d
